calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Trust And Appointing Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Klingenberg, Esq., counsel for Ronald Librano, Petitioner (appearing by telephone).

At the outset the Court notes review of the docket and questions whether the Court might rightfully revise the Settlor's stated direction to appoint a corporate trustee as successor upon the inability of the named successor trustees to serve. Court and counsel discuss the history of the trust, that the original successor trustees were all individuals who unfortunately passed away before the trust beneficiary, and that the corpus of the trust is essentially an interest in real property on Guerrero Street in San Francisco which does not produce income.

Court and counsel discuss the qualifications of the proposed successor trustee to so serve. The Court advises counsel that the proposed revisions to the trust include ex parte appointment of a successor trustee which is not allowed and which the Court would excise from the proposed Order.

After further discussion, the Court takes the matter under submission with the stated intention to grant the Petition as modified.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (D204)
